Manual input in controlling methods of washing or rinsing machines for crockery or tableware, i.e. information entered by a user
Consumable products information, e.g. information on detergent, rinsing aid or salt; Dispensing device information, e.g. information on the type, e.g. detachable, or status of the device
Operation mode, e.g. delicate washing, economy washing, reduced time, sterilizing, water softener regenerating, odor eliminating or service
Crockery or tableware details, e.g. material, quantity, condition
Other manual input
Automatic detection in controlling methods of washing or rinsing machines for crockery or tableware, e.g. information provided by sensors entered into controlling devices
Consumable products information, e.g. information on detergent, rinsing aid or salt; Dispensing device information, e.g. information on the type, e.g. detachable, or status of the device
Operation mode, e.g. delicate washing, economy washing, reduced time, sterilizing, water softener regenerating, odor eliminating or service
Crockery or tableware details, e.g. material, quantity, condition
Water supply, circulation or discharge information
Status of hydraulic components, e.g. open/close status of water inlet/outlet valves, operating position of water diverters
Drain or recirculation pump parameters, e.g. pump rotational speed or current absorbed by the motor
Water level
Water cloudiness or dirtiness, e.g. turbidity, foaming or level of bacteria
Water hardness, acidity or basicity
Water temperature
Water pressure or flow rate
Air pressure
Air temperature
Air humidity
Time, e.g. elapsed operating time
Number of operational cycles
Spray arms status, e.g. detection of spray arm rotation
Loading door status, e.g. door latch opened or closed state
Conveyor belt parameters, e.g. velocity of conveyor belts
Variation of electrical, magnetical or optical quantities
Vibration or sound detection
Other automatic detections

Output in controlling method of washing or rinsing machines for crockery or tableware, i.e. quantities or components controlled, or actions performed by the controlling device executing the controlling method
Water supply, e.g. opening or closure of the water inlet valve
Water discharge, e.g. opening or closure of discharge valve
Water recirculation, e.g. control of distributing valves for redirection of water flow
Water pressure or flow rate
Drain or recirculation pump, e.g. regulation of the pump rotational speed or flow direction
Water heaters
Consumable products, e.g. detergent, rinse aids or salt
Air circulation, e.g. air intake or venting arrangements
Air heaters
Air blowers
Steam generators
Sterilisers
Water softening devices
Spray nozzles or spray arms
Loading doors, e.g. door latches, inflatable door seals
Conveyor belts, e.g. conveyor belts motors
Indication or alarm to the controlling device or to the user
Machine starting, e.g. normal start, restart after electricity cut-off or start scheduling

Regulation of machine operational steps within the washing process, e.g. performing an additional rinsing phase, shortening or stopping of the drying phase, washing at decreased noise operation conditions
Stopping or disabling machine operation, including disconnecting the machine from a network, e.g. from an electrical power supply

Change machine operation from normal operational mode into special mode, e.g. service mode, resin regeneration mode, sterilizing mode, steam mode, odour eliminating mode or special cleaning mode to clean the hydraulic circuit
Other output
Washing methods characterised by the use of a particular treatment
Pressurised cleaning liquid delivered by a pump
Pressurised, gaseous medium, also used for delivering of cleaning liquid

Ultraviolet radiation

Agitation of cleaning liquid by impeller
